batches.description: Bootstrap Comtrade day 1 for the existing 16 reporters, core commodities, and the 2020-2026 window.
Bootstrap Comtrade day 2 for the existing 16 reporters, core commodities, and the 2015-2019 window.
Bootstrap Comtrade day 3 for the new 16 reporters, core commodities, and the 2020-2025 window.
Bootstrap Comtrade day 4 for the new 16 reporters, core commodities, and the 2015-2019 window.
Bootstrap Comtrade day 5 for all 32 reporters, extension commodities, and the 2020-2026 window.
Bootstrap Comtrade day 6 for all 32 reporters, extension commodities, and the 2015-2019 window.
Bootstrap PortWatch history from January 2020 through current.
Bootstrap Brent daily and monthly history from January 2020 through current.
Bootstrap ECB FX monthly history from January 2020 through current.
Bootstrap event bridge history from January 2020 through December 2022.
Bootstrap World Bank energy vulnerability history from 2015 through current.
Bootstrap PortWatch history from January 2015 through December 2019.
Bootstrap Brent daily and monthly history from January 2015 through December 2019.
Bootstrap ECB FX monthly history from January 2015 through December 2019.
Bootstrap event bridge history from January 2023 through December 2024.
Refresh the latest Comtrade window on a monthly cadence after all six Comtrade bootstrap days complete.
Refresh the recent PortWatch window on a weekly cadence after both PortWatch bootstrap phases complete.
Refresh the recent Brent window on a weekly cadence after both Brent bootstrap phases complete.
Refresh the recent FX window on a weekly cadence after both FX bootstrap phases complete.
Refresh the recent event bridge window after both events bootstrap phases have validated.
Refresh the current-year World Bank energy window on a yearly cadence after the bootstrap completes.
